title: Phantom Redux
description: Tries to make phantoms a bit better
body:
# Phantom Redux
This mod makes a couple small changes to phantom game mechanics:
- Phantoms will not attack players that have rested in the last 4 days.
- Phantoms will be invisible to players that have rested in the last 3 days, between 3 and 4 days they will be partially visible but will not attack.

![Semi-transparent Phantom](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/G7JmIEEi/images/fa91433d2847495bc9719acf835dfb2685bee94e.png)

*Semi-transparent Phantom*
